title: Viola huesoensis
taxonomy: Viola huesoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It belongs to the genus Viola, which includes around 400 to 500 species. The genus Viola is part of the larger order Malpighiales, within the subclass Rosidae. This classification places Viola huesoensis in the larger clade of eudicots. Further classification includes the class Magnoliopsida, phylum Angiospermophyta, and kingdom Plantae.
